idle.eeg_auto_stop_hint: If a seizure starts, any active EEG activity is stopped automatically and a seizure reference is added to the EEG log.

recording.video_hint: Start only if it is safe and helpful to capture the seizure.
recording.video_error_unavailable: Camera permission or video recording is not available on this device.

tagging.no_ictal_symptoms: Ingen iktale symptomer er registreret endnu.
tagging.post_ictal_paralysis_help: Registrer Todd's parese med præcise berørte kropsdele.

export.title: Eksport og rapporter
export.backup_json_desc: Full encrypted data snapshot for backup and device migration. AuraTrack encrypts the file before it is saved.
export.csv_desc: Hændelser, medicin og doseringslog i kommasepareret format. Åbner i Excel / Sheets.
export.pdf_desc: Udskrivbar hændelseslog med noter og symptomstier. Åbner en forhåndsvisning i appen, så du kan udskrive eller gemme som PDF.
export.neuro_report_desc: Formålsbygget klinisk PDF — patientoplysninger, fasetider, symptomoversigt og fuld hændelseslog. Formateret til præsentation for neurolog eller specialist.
export.neuro_report_warning: ⚠ Tilføj patientnavn under Indstillinger → Identitet for en komplet rapport.
export.ios_pdf_hint: På iPhone/iPad skal du trykke på Udskriv for at gemme dette som PDF.
export.diary_desc: En ensidet månedlig anfaldsdagbog med farvekodede hændelsesdage. Åbner i en forhåndsvisning i appen til udskrift eller PDF-gemning.

docs.ictal_symptom_log: Iktal symptomlog — alle hændelser i perioden
docs.no_symptoms_period: Ingen symptomer registreret i denne periode.
docs.no_clinical_flags: Ingen kliniske flag registreret i denne rapportperiode.
docs.disclaimer_intro: Denne rapport blev genereret af AuraTrack v{{version}}, en PWA til personlig anfaldslogning. Alle data blev indtastet af pårørende eller patient.
docs.disclaimer_medical: Dette dokument erstatter ikke professionel medicinsk vurdering. Tidspunkter og varigheder er baseret på manuel registrering.
docs.disclaimer_edited: Fasevarigheder markeret som redigerede kan afvige fra registrering i realtid.
docs.diary_footer: Genereret af AuraTrack · {{date}} · Alle data registreret af pårørende eller patient. Erstatter ikke professionel medicinsk vurdering.
docs.expected_doses: (forventet ~{{count}} for dette regime i den valgte periode)
docs.no_dose_logs: Ingen doselogs registreret i denne periode.
docs.no_data_available: Ingen data tilgængelige for denne periode
docs.flag_detail_recent_vs_prior: {{recent}} hændelser i de seneste 15 dage mod {{prior}} i de foregående 15 dage.
docs.flag_detail_auto_terminated: Timeren stoppede automatisk efter 12 minutter på grund af manglende respons fra patienten; kan tyde på en forlænget fase efter anfaldet.
docs.flag_detail_edited_records: Fasevarigheder eller detaljer blev ændret efter første registrering og kan afvige fra realtidsregistrering.
docs.no_wellbeing_entries: Ingen trivselsnotater registreret i denne periode.

export.eeg_desc: Export the most recent EEG session as a table-first clinical PDF.
export.privacy_notice_body: Encrypted backups are protected with your passphrase before they are saved. CSV, PDF, and video exports are still regular files, so treat them like medical documents.

event_detail.title: Hændelsesdetaljer
event_detail.danger_prolonged_desc: Denne hændelse varede mere end 5 minutter. Søg lægehjælp, hvis det ikke allerede er gjort.
event_detail.danger_cluster_desc: {{count}} anfald forekom inden for 8 minutter. Kontakt omgående en neurolog.
event_detail.video_saved_hint: The file is saved in device storage and referenced here for the neurologist record.

recording.title: Optagelse af et anfald
steps: Tryk på den store START-knap, når et anfald begynder.
I pårørendetilstand trykkes på faseknapperne (Aura slut, Anfald slut) efterhånden som hver fase skifter. I selvtilstand er grænsefladen forenklet til en enkelt stopknap.
Tryk på + Hændelsesnotat for at tilføje et tidsstemplet notat midt under optagelsen — brug genvejsknapperne til hyppige hændelser som Faldt, Nødmedicin givet, Reagerer ikke osv.
Tryk på STOP, når anfaldet er slut. Hvis tidtageren stadig kører ved 12 minutter, stopper optagelsen automatisk og hændelsen gemmes.

tagging.title: Mærkning af hændelser
steps: Efter stop åbnes en mærkningsguide automatisk.
Vælg anfaldtype, berørte legemsdele og observerede symptomer.
Tilføj fritekstnoter og tryk på GEM. Du kan redigere enhver hændelse senere fra Historik.

manual.title: Manuel registrering
steps: Tryk på + Registrer tidligere anfald på startskærmen for at registrere et anfald, du ikke optog i realtid.
Angiv dato, tidspunkt og varighed, og gennemfør derefter mærkningsguiden som normalt.

medications.title: Medicinsporing
steps: Tilføj din medicin under Indstillinger → Medicin.
Startskærmen viser dagens planlagte doser — tryk på hver medicinknap for at skifte den, og tryk derefter på Gem for at logge doserne.
Aktiver påmindelser pr. medicin under Indstillinger → Medicin.

history.title: Historik og eksport
steps: Åbn HISTORIK for at gennemse, søge og filtrere alle registrerede hændelser.
Tryk på en hændelse for at se detaljer eller redigere den.
Use EXPORT (from History) to generate a PDF neurologist report, CSV, or encrypted backup.

settings.title: Indstillinger og tilgængelighed
steps: Skift mellem Selv- og Pårørendetilstand under Indstillinger for at tilpasse grænsefladen.
Skift tema, skriftstørrelse og accentfarve efter dine præferencer.
Tilføj din neurologs navn og nødkontakter til hurtig adgang under et anfald.

wellbeing.title: Daily Wellbeing
steps: Use the Daily Wellbeing Check-In to record mood, intensity, notes, and context factors for the day.
Configure wellbeing factors in Settings → Wellbeing. Scale, number, and boolean factors can be enabled or hidden without changing old entries.
The Wellbeing history tab helps compare entries with seizure timing. These patterns are for discussion and do not prove a trigger caused a seizure.
Neurologist reports can chart mood and numeric wellbeing factors as separate lines, with seizures kept visually distinct as bars.

eeg.title: EEG Diary
steps: Turn on EEG diary controls in Settings → Recording when long-term EEG monitoring is needed.
Start an EEG session, then log activities, symptoms, medication changes, sleep, meals, and other clinically useful observations during the session.
Link seizure records when a seizure occurs during the EEG period so the report can connect the diary context to the event.
Export the EEG diary from History → Export when you need a printable session summary.

reports.title: Reports & Exports
steps: Use History → Export to create encrypted backups, CSV files, printable event logs, neurologist reports, monthly seizure diaries, and EEG diary PDFs.
The neurologist report includes medications, adherence counts, event tables, clinical flags, data-quality notes, and charted seizure trends.
Report charts use sans-serif text and strict value-label limits so dense reports stay readable. The wellbeing chart uses seizure bars plus separate mood and numeric/context lines.
AuraTrack does not calculate an average mood intensity score; wellbeing summaries focus on entries, days covered, top moods, top context factors, and recent entries.

sync_backup.title: Sync & Backup
steps: Use encrypted backups for recovery or device migration. The passphrase is required to restore and is not stored by AuraTrack.
Use Easy Sync, Private Sync, or manual encrypted transfer when moving data between devices.
Settings → Data & Backup shows storage protection status, backup reminders, import/export tools, and destructive data actions.
CSV, PDF, video, and backup files are sensitive medical files. Store and share them carefully.

about.title: Om
about.about_text: AuraTrack er en privatlivsfokuseret app til anfaldsregistrering for mennesker med epilepsi og deres pårørende. Optag anfald i realtid, beskriv hændelser med kliniske detaljer, spor medicin og generer strukturerede rapporter til din neurolog — alt gemt lokalt på din enhed.
about.privacy_text: Alle data gemmes på din enhed ved hjælp af IndexedDB. Dine sundhedsdata forlader kun enheden, når du selv eksporterer en backup eller starter synkronisering.
about.disclaimer_text: AuraTrack er et personligt registreringsværktøj og er ikke en medicinsk enhed. Det er ikke beregnet til at diagnosticere, behandle eller erstatte professionel medicinsk rådgivning. Konsulter altid en kvalificeret sundhedsudbyder vedrørende din tilstand og behandling.
about.opensource_text: AuraTrack er open source. Rapporter fejl eller foreslå funktioner på GitHub Issues.

local.title: Gemt lokalt
local.body: AuraTrack stores event logs, medications, dose logs, EEG diary entries, and report settings in IndexedDB on your device. The app does not require an account to create or keep these records.

sharing.title: Når data deles
sharing.body: Your health data leaves AuraTrack only when you choose to export a backup or report, print a PDF, save a video recording, or send data to another device during sync.

sync.title: Synkronisering
sync.body: AuraTrack's device-to-device sync uses browser-encrypted transport. Depending on the sync mode, connection or signaling metadata may still pass through the signaling service or your local network.

exports.title: Eksportsikkerhed
exports.body: Encrypted backups are protected by the passphrase you choose. Exported CSV, PDF, and video files remain regular files on the destination device.

identity.mode_desc_caretaker: Optagelse for en anden person. Fulde fasestyringskontroller er synlige under optagelse.
identity.mode_desc_self: Optagelse af dine egne hændelser. Forenklet enknapsgrænseflade.

recording.haptic_help: Vibration ved knapbetjening (enheden skal understøtte det)
recording.quick_labels_help: Tilpas genvejsknapperne vist under optagelse. Lad feltet stå tomt for at skjule en knap.
recording.eeg_diary_help: Turn this on only when long-term EEG monitoring is needed. The EEG diary controls stay hidden on the idle screen unless enabled.
recording.wellbeing_help: Valgfri registrering af humør og kontekst for at finde mønstre.
recording.wellbeing_reminder_help: Valgfri påmindelse. Den springes over, når der er gemt et trivselsnotat for dagen.
recording.wellbeing_factors_help: Vælg de kontekstfelter, der vises i trivselsarket. Eksisterende dagbogsnotater beholder deres gemte etiketter.

medications.section_desc: Aktuel medicinering. Bruges i rapporter og dosislogging.
medications.start_date_help: Den tidligste dato vist i medicinhistorik. Lad stå tomt for automatisk registrering.
medications.reminder_granted_help: Påmindelser aktiveres, mens appen er åben eller i baggrunden.
medications.reminder_denied_help: Blokeret i browserindstillinger — nulstil webstedstilladelser for at genaktivere.
medications.ios_reminder_note: På iOS skal appen installeres på startskærmen for at notifikationer virker. Notifikationer kræver, at appen kører eller er i baggrunden — de kan ikke leveres, når appen er helt lukket.

reports.section_desc: Oplysninger brugt til at generere kliniske neurolograpporter.
reports.include_dob_help: Om fødselsdato vises i udskrevne rapporter
reports.notes_placeholder: Medicin, kendte udløsende faktorer, klinikkerens instrukser eller andet der skal med i slutningen af rapporterne...

data.clear_confirm: Dette sletter permanent registrerede hændelser, medicin og doseringslogge. Kan ikke fortrydes.
data.import_failed: Import mislykkedes — ugyldig eller beskadiget fil.
data.persistence_help_checking: AuraTrack is checking whether the browser will protect this PWA storage from eviction.
data.persistence_help_granted: Browser-managed storage has been marked persistent. Data should not be evicted except by explicit user action.
data.persistence_help_denied: The browser did not grant persistent storage. Backups remain the main protection against data loss.
data.persistence_help_unsupported: This browser does not expose persistent storage controls. Backups remain the main protection against data loss.
data.persistence_help_error: AuraTrack could not confirm persistent storage protection on this device. Backups remain the main protection against data loss.
data.last_backup_help: Updated when an encrypted backup file is saved successfully.
data.backup_reminders_help: Reminders appear when no successful backup has been created within the chosen interval.
data.security_current: AuraTrack backups are exported as encrypted files protected by your chosen passphrase.
data.security_exports: CSV, PDF, and video exports are not encrypted by AuraTrack. Anyone who can open those files can read their contents.
data.security_sync: Device-to-device sync uses browser-encrypted transport, but sync setup can still expose connection metadata depending on whether you use PeerJS signaling or local-network QR exchange.
data.security_recommendation: Keep your backup passphrase somewhere safe. AuraTrack cannot recover forgotten backup passphrases.
data.persistence_help_not_requested: This browser may show a permission prompt, so AuraTrack waits for you to request storage protection manually.
data.persistence_detail_flow_prompt: User-initiated request. A browser permission prompt may appear when you tap the button.
data.persistence_detail_flow_auto: Automatic browser decision. The browser may silently grant or deny without showing a permission popup.
data.persistence_detail_browser_webkit: WebKit browsers on iPhone/iPad and Safari-class environments usually decide this silently. Installing the app can help storage quotas, but backups are still essential.
data.persistence_detail_browser_chromium: Chromium browsers such as Chrome and Edge usually decide this from browser heuristics, so tapping again may recheck without showing a prompt.
data.persistence_detail_browser_gecko: Firefox-class browsers may show a permission prompt when requested from this screen.
data.persistence_detail_browser_generic: Browser behavior varies by engine and device.
data.persistence_detail_reason: Exact denial reasons are not exposed by the web API, so AuraTrack can only show the browser result, not why it decided that way.

about_section.reinstall_sub: Tryk, hvis du ved en fejl afviste installationsbanneret

delete_modal.title: SLET POST?
delete_modal.body: Denne medicinske registrering vil blive permanent fjernet. Handlingen kan ikke fortrydes.

manual_entry.title: Registrer tidligere anfald
manual_entry.intro: Angiv dato, tidspunkt og varighed for anfaldet. Du kan derefter tilføje anfaldtype, symptomer, udløsende faktorer og noter.
manual_entry.error_duration: Den samlede varighed skal være større end 0.

event_card.notes_placeholder: Clinical observations, after-seizure notes, medication given...
event_card.cluster_title: Cluster seizures / Status Epilepticus risk - {{count}} events within 8 minutes

summary.notes_placeholder: Kliniske observationer, noter efter anfaldet, givet medicin...

eeg.title: EEG Diary
eeg.description: EEG sessions stay separate from seizure history. Seizures recorded during EEG appear here as linked reference rows.
eeg.no_activities: No EEG activities logged for this session.
eeg.linked_description: This entry is linked to the seizure record and keeps its timing from that event.

wellbeing.idle_hint: Humør og kontekst er valgfrit, men hjælper med at finde mønstre.
wellbeing.chart_help: Denne visning hjælper med at finde mønstre. Den beviser ikke, at en faktor forårsagede et anfald.
wellbeing.notification_body: Tilføj humør og kontekst, mens det stadig er friskt.

moods.content_help: Okay eller tilfreds, har det fint med tingene som de er.
moods.sad_low_help: Nedtrykt, ulykkelig, tilbagetrukket eller mindre interesseret end normalt.
moods.anxious_worried_help: Nervøs, bange eller forventer noget dårligt.
moods.stressed_overloaded_help: Under pres, for meget sker, svært at klare.
moods.irritable_angry_help: Let irriteret, kort for hovedet eller vred.
moods.restless_agitated_help: Kan ikke falde til ro, går omkring, opkørt eller tydeligt aktiveret.
moods.tired_sleepy_help: Lav energi, døsig eller vil gerne sove.
moods.confused_help: Desorienteret, uklar eller har svært ved at følge med.
moods.emotionally_flat_help: Få synlige følelser eller nedsat respons.
moods.very_happy_euphoric_help: Usædvanligt højt, begejstret eller intenst positivt humør.

factors.sleeplessness_help: Lange vågne perioder, meget forsinket søvn eller meget afbrudt søvn.
factors.missed_bowel_movement_help: Ingen afføring, når det var forventet for personen.
factors.stress_help: Pres, overbelastning, konflikt eller krævende begivenheder.
factors.illness_fever_help: Tegn på sygdom, infektion, feber eller utilpashed.
factors.missed_medication_help: Planlagt medicin blev glemt eller væsentligt forsinket.
factors.hormonal_menstruation_help: Menstruation, hormonelle ændringer eller mistænkte cyklusrelaterede symptomer.
factors.unusual_activity_help: En dag der var mere aktiv, anderledes eller stimulerende end normalt.
factors.tearful_crying_help: Gråd eller tydelig tårevædethed, uanset om personen kunne forklare hvorfor.

wellbeing.choose_mood_error: Vælg et humør, før du gemmer.

sync.import_summary_with_wellbeing: Tilføjede {{events}} hændelse(r), {{medications}} medicin(er), {{logs}} dosislog(s), {{eegSessions}} EEG-session(er), {{eegActivities}} EEG-aktivitetsnotat(er) og {{wellbeingEntries}} trivselsnotater.
sync.role_locked: Role locked because this page was opened from a sync QR code.
sync.already_up_to_date: Both devices were already up to date - no new records added.
sync.already_up_to_date_short: Already up to date - no new records.
sync.scan_qr_prompt: Point camera at the QR code
sync.scan_sender_prompt: Point camera at the sender device QR code
sync.camera_denied: Camera access denied. Allow camera permission and try again.
sync.easy_sender_intro: This device will send its AuraTrack data to another device over the internet. Start here, then let the receiving device scan the QR code.
sync.easy_receiver_intro: This device will receive AuraTrack data from another device over the internet. On the sender device, open Easy Sync and scan its QR code with this device.
sync.easy_security: Data travels peer-to-peer over a browser-encrypted connection. A PIN confirms both devices are yours.
sync.easy_metadata: PeerJS is used for connection signaling only; sync still shares metadata such as connection IDs.
sync.easy_step_1: 1. Open Easy Sync on the sender device.
sync.easy_step_2: 2. Scan the sender QR with this device.
sync.easy_step_3: 3. Compare the PINs and press Start Sync on this receiving device.
sync.verify_pin_both: Security PIN - verify on both screens
sync.waiting_receiver_connect: Waiting for the receiver device to connect... (90s)
sync.pin_match_question: Does this PIN match the sender device?
sync.verify_pin_receiver: Verify this PIN on the receiver device
sync.waiting_receiver_confirm: Waiting for the receiver device to confirm the PIN...
sync.private_sender_intro: This device will send its AuraTrack data directly over the same WiFi network. No relay server is used after setup.
sync.private_receiver_intro: This device will receive AuraTrack data directly over the same WiFi network. Start on the sender device, then scan its connection QR from this device.
sync.private_security: Signaling travels via QR codes only - no relay server. Your data and metadata stay on your local network.
sync.private_scans: Requires two QR scans: receiver scans sender offer QR, then sender scans receiver answer QR.
sync.private_step_1: 1. Open Private Sync on the sender device.
sync.private_step_2: 2. Scan the sender connection QR with this device.
sync.private_step_3: 3. Show the answer QR back to the sender device.
sync.step1_receiver_scans: Step 1: Receiver scans this QR code
sync.after_receiver_scan: After the receiver scans this, it will show an answer QR
sync.show_to_sender: Show this to the sender device to scan
sync.waiting_sender_scan: Waiting for the sender device to scan this QR code...
sync.manual_sender_intro: Create an encrypted AuraTrack backup on this device and send that file to the receiving device by AirDrop, Files, email, or cloud storage.
sync.manual_receiver_intro: Import an encrypted AuraTrack backup from another device. Safe to repeat - duplicates are automatically skipped.
sync.invalid_qr: That QR code is not a valid AuraTrack sync code.
sync.title: Sync to Another Device

install.ios_hint: Tap the Share menu, then Add to Home Screen

install.offline_hint: Add to your home screen for offline access

medication_panel.all_done_today: All doses for today are up to date
medication_panel.no_scheduled_today: No scheduled doses today. Add medications in Settings > Medications.
medication_panel.extra_dose_help: Doctor-advised extra dose, rescue medication, or any unscheduled dose.

modal.passphrase_short_hint: Use at least 8 characters. A few memorable words works well.
modal.passphrase_ok_hint: Keep this passphrase somewhere safe. AuraTrack cannot recover it later.
modal.passphrase_short_error: Passphrase must be at least 8 characters.
modal.no_data: No health data available to back up.
modal.export_failed: Encrypted backup could not be saved.
modal.passphrase_required: Enter the backup passphrase to continue.
modal.not_encrypted: Selected file is not an encrypted backup.
modal.import_bad_passphrase: Incorrect passphrase or damaged backup file.
modal.export_body: AuraTrack will encrypt the backup before saving it. The file name can be changed in the save dialog.
modal.export_warning: If you forget this passphrase, the backup cannot be recovered.
modal.import_body: AuraTrack will decrypt this backup in memory, import it, and will not write a plaintext copy to device storage.

reminder.title: Opret en ny sikkerhedskopi
reminder.body: It has been more than {{days}} days since the last successful backup. A new encrypted backup helps recover data after browser resets, site-data deletion, or device migration.
